result.description: Ingestion results. Present only when ok=true.

report_metadata.description: Metadata extracted from the source report.

campaign_name.description: Named campaign or operation if identified.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence. 'low'=regex match only, 'medium'=regex + structural context, 'high'=LLM-confirmed.

context.description: Surrounding text or context where the IOC was found.

priority.description: Operational priority based on LLM assessment of the IOC's role in the described attack.

related_mitre.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs associated with this IOC.

defanged.description: True if the original value was defanged (e.g., hxxp://, [.]com) and has been re-fanged.

mitre_mappings.description: MITRE ATT&CK techniques identified in the report. Identity key is (technique_id, tactic) — the same technique may appear multiple times with different tactics when it serves different roles across attack paths.

tactic.description: Parent tactic (e.g., Initial Access). Combined with technique_id forms the entry identity key.

confidence.description: 'explicit' if the technique ID appears in the report text. 'inferred' if the LLM mapped described behavior to a technique.

report_context.description: Brief excerpt or description of the behavior mapped to this technique.

context_paths.description: Attack graph path IDs where this (technique_id, tactic) pair appears. Absent for entries not linked to a graph step.

mitre_validated.description: True if the technique_id exists in the official MITRE ATT&CK matrix. False indicates the ID was generated by the LLM and does not correspond to an official technique — the associated behavior may still be accurate.

tactic_mismatch.description: Present and True when the assigned tactic is not in the official ATT&CK tactic list for this technique. The technique_id is valid (mitre_validated=true) but the tactic may be an LLM hallucination. Absent when the tactic matches or when no MITRE database is available.

ioc_breakdown.description: Count of IOCs by type, e.g., {"ip": 23, "domain": 12}.

mitre_technique_count.description: Total number of (technique_id, tactic) role entries.

output_artifacts.description: Artifacts registered as output of this tool execution.
